blocked_items: No runtime wrapper implementation produced in Stage1 by design.
No caller retrofits until Stage2 wrapper executable fixtures pass.

gate_results.evidence: ADS defines problem, authority, scope in/out, and no-implementation boundary.
Contract defines envelope input, decision output, failure event side effects.
CWE-78, shell injection, argument injection, path escape, timeout stall, and output overflow included.
shell denied by default; argv array; executable resolver; cwd root binding; minimal env; byte caps.
30s total cap, 3 attempt max, 1 MiB per stream cap, kill grace cap specified.
Failure event schema and required classifications specified.
4 positive and 8 negative fixtures specified for Stage2 executable validation.
Pre-spawn and post-execution decision packets required.
Implementation deferred to Stage2; handoff names exact next stage.
